text:
The Jenners didn’t go to a traditional high school, which is a shame, because I’m pretty sure Kendall would’ve killed Spirit Week.Kendall Jennerat theOlympicswas basically a Team USA mascot, because apparently she bleeds red, white, and blue.

Jenner showed up to watch the women’s gymnastics all-around final on August 1 wearing an official Team USA jacket from Ralph Lauren—thesame jackets that will be worn by the flag bearers at the closing ceremony—as well as a matching hat.

The blue zip-up is emblazoned with “USA” patches and insignia, with an armband reading “24” and a red and white stripe in the middle with “USA” written in big, bold letters. The jacket is available on the Ralph Lauren website, so it doesn’t look like Jenner necessarily had to pull any strings to get her hands on one. The model’s patriotic ensemble also included classic blue jeans (very Americana), a plain white T-shirt, sunglasses, and black loafers.

Honestly, of all thecelebrities we’ve seen at the Paris Olympics, and there have been many, no one has shown as much Team USA spirit as Jenner with their outfits. You simply have to respect it.

Who would have predicted that, of all people, Kendall Jenner at the Olympics was going to make me feel so much pride for my country? U-S-A! U-S-A!

title: Kendall Jenner at the Olympics Is Showing Some Serious Team Spirit | Glamour
author: Kathleen Walsh
description: Kendall Jenner’s Olympics outfit included an official Team USA jacket and a matching hat, showing her American pride.
